_meta.purpose: Knowledge-cutoff probe questions. 4 candidate questions per month; 'selected' is the 2 used by the runner (falls back to 'recommend').
_meta.design: Grading is keyword-only. Each selected question's answer is a SHORT, DISTINCTIVE token AND an UNGUESSABLE outcome (a winner, a death, or a specific named result) that cannot be inferred from pre-event/static knowledge or from the question wording. Wrong answers are typically refusals, so broad accept lists are safe.
_meta.grading: Correct iff any string in 'accept' appears in the reply (case-insensitive) and the reply is not a refusal.
_meta.confidence_notes: All months 2023-06 .. 2026-04 are populated. 2025-12 .. 2026-04 events sourced from web search (post-Jan-2026).
